narrative:
Knox County has 41,418 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.1 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.7% of registrants.
